ModMetaData.name: RimSynapse - WorldNews
ModMetaData.author: RimSynapse Team
ModMetaData.description: [h1]RimSynapse - WorldNews[/h1] [b]Companion Mod for RimSynapse.[/b] Makes the RimWorld feel alive, reactive, and historically grounded by acting as the local journalist and gossip mill for the planet. Generates dynamic newspapers based on real events in your game.
